style_a.name: 港片复古胶片
style_a.prompt_suffix: Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, heavy film grain, red and green neon glow, warm yellow tones, anamorphic lens, claustrophobic framing, Hong Kong retro 1990s aesthetic

style_b.name: 茶山奇幻古风
style_b.prompt_suffix: lush green tea mountain, ethereal mist, golden sunrise, traditional Chinese fantasy, flowing hanfu robes, vibrant saturated colors, epic aerial landscape, dreamy oriental mythology

music_sync.lyrics: [Chorus Climax] 我是凡人 但我的歌不凡！/ 在两个世界 同时燃烧的灵魂

atmosphere.overall_mood: 双世界快剪高潮——港风键盘火星四溅与茶山击碎雷云交替闪切，两个形态的动作完全同步
atmosphere.lighting: 港风霓虹+茶山金光交替闪切

video_prompt: Rapid cross-cutting between two worlds: Hong Kong apartment with sparking keyboard AND tea mountains with lightning storms, same person in two forms performing synchronized actions, Wong Kar-wai neon style alternating with Chinese fantasy epic, maximum visual intensity, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 副歌高潮——最高能量点，双鼓点交织
bgm.instruments: 全编制双重配器（电子+管弦乐同时全力）
bgm.dynamics: 最大输出→突然静止→最后一击

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 【A世界】港风出租屋——创作者A疯狂敲键盘，每次击键迸出火星，CRT屏幕显示倒计时

characters.name: 创作者A
characters.action: 疯狂高速打字，键盘冒火星

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 港风世界的极致编码——键盘如武器
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 高速键盘声、火花迸溅声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a man in vintage suit frantically typing on a mechanical keyboard in a Hong Kong apartment, sparks flying from each keystroke like a blacksmith's forge, CRT monitor blazing with code, red and green neon light, manic intensity, Wong Kar-wai style, heavy film grain, flash-cut editing energy, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 【B世界】茶山——创作者B手持代码之剑向雷云劈出同样节奏的剑击，每一剑卡在同一个鼓点上

characters.name: 创作者B
characters.action: 挥剑击向雷云，节奏与键盘同步

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶山世界的极致战斗——剑击如编码
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 剑击雷云声、闪电裂空声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a white-robed warrior swinging a golden code-sword upward at dark thunderclouds above tea mountains, each slash releasing golden energy arcs into the stormy sky, lightning flashing, rain and wind, epic martial arts combat against the heavens, Chinese fantasy battle, vibrant dramatic lighting, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 【快剪叠合】两个世界的画面开始重叠——键盘火星与剑气金光在同一帧中交织

transition.description: 两个世界画面半透明叠合

storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 两个世界在同一帧中融合——共振
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Double exposure composite: a man typing at a keyboard in neon Hong Kong apartment overlaid with a white-robed warrior swinging a golden sword on tea mountains, both images semi-transparent and overlapping, sparks and sword energy merging, two worlds existing in the same frame, surreal dual-reality composition, dramatic, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 【A世界】CRT屏幕碎裂——代码爆出屏幕如碎玻璃，主角的拳头打穿了显示器
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 旧世界最后的破坏——CRT被拳头打碎
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Dramatic close-up of a fist punching through a CRT monitor screen, glass and green code exploding outward in slow motion, sparks and digital debris flying, the destruction of the old world screen, Wong Kar-wai violent impact moment, heavy film grain, dynamic lighting from the exploding screen, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 【B世界】代码之剑击碎最后一块雷云——金色能量爆炸，雷云被彻底粉碎
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶山世界的赢——雷云被完全击碎
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 雷云碎裂的巨响、胜利的能量波
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Epic low angle shot of a white-robed warrior delivering a final upward sword strike that shatters the last massive thundercloud, the cloud exploding into fragments of dark vapor and golden energy, clear blue sky breaking through, the warrior's victorious pose silhouetted against the golden energy burst, Chinese fantasy climactic victory, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 【双世界融合】两个世界的空间开始碎裂融合——港风霓虹碎片与茶山景象碎片如拼图般重组
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 时空碎裂——两个世界的边界彻底崩坏
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 空间碎裂声、拼图重组声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Surreal image of two worlds shattering and merging: fragmented pieces of a neon-lit Hong Kong apartment floating in space alongside broken shards of green tea mountain landscape, the pieces recombining like a jigsaw puzzle, creating an impossible hybrid space, the boundary between worlds dissolving, cinematically dramatic, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 两个形态的主角开始向彼此奔跑——创作者A在碎裂港风空间中，创作者B在碎裂茶山空间中，他们在正中线即将相遇
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 双重自我向彼此冲刺——即将合一
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 加速的心跳声、双倍脚步声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Split composition: on the left a man in vintage suit running forward through a shattering neon Hong Kong space, on the right the same man in white warrior robes running forward through a breaking tea mountain fantasy space, both converging toward the center line, mirror-image running poses, about to collide, dual-reality convergence moment, dramatic, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 碰撞！——两个形态在正中心相遇交融，瞬间爆发出巨大的白金色能量冲击波
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 凡人与传奇的合一——最终融合
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 巨大的能量碰撞冲击波声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Two figures colliding at the center of frame - a man in vintage suit and a warrior in white robes merging into each other in an explosion of white-gold energy, massive shockwave rippling outward, fragments of both neon Hong Kong and green tea mountains scattered in the blast, the ultimate fusion of two identities, epic visual climax, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 白金色光芒逐渐消散——只留下一个新的身影站在两个世界残片中央，既非完全的A也非完全的B
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 尘埃落定——融合后的新存在
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: A single figure standing in the center of a space filled with floating fragments of two worlds - neon signs and tea terraces drifting around like debris in zero gravity, the white-gold light of the collision fading, the figure's silhouette combining elements of both a suit and white warrior robes, aftermath of the ultimate fusion, ethereal calm after the storm, 16:9 aspect ratio
